creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:
The ru.FreeBSD.org DNS zone needs to be updated to remove/repoint ftp4.ru.freebsd.org.

If removed, https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors-ftp.html should be updated via:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk?view=log

as well.
